question: Will CPI rise more than 0.8% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI report has already been released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics on April 10, 2026, showing a 0.3% monthly increase. This is definitively below the 0.8% threshold required for a YES resolution. The market should resolve to NO with 100% certainty since the official data is already available.
key_factors: Official BLS data released showing 0.3% monthly CPI increase
No uncertainty remains as official data is published
risks: Data revision risk is minimal for headline CPI figures
No interpretation ambiguity in resolution criteria
